name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Taxonomy
governing_principle: Evidence posture describes the condition of an evidence artifact or evidence chain. It does not determine truth, falsity, guilt, deception, or subject status.

dimensions.name: Artifact Identification
dimensions.definition: Whether the item being examined is clearly defined as an evidence artifact with bounded scope.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Identifying an artifact does not identify, accuse, or judge any connected subject.

dimensions.name: Provenance Visibility
dimensions.definition: Whether origin, custody, creation context, or publication path of an artifact is visible and examinable.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Limited provenance does not establish manipulation, bad faith, or subject deception.

dimensions.name: Source Confidence
dimensions.definition: Whether the source record is known, bounded, and appropriate to the artifact or claim under examination.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Low source confidence does not accuse a person or institution of dishonesty or fraud.

dimensions.name: Contextual Stability
dimensions.definition: Whether surrounding context is stable, missing, disputed, or unclear relative to the artifact.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Unstable context does not determine whether a depicted or referenced event occurred.

dimensions.name: Forensic Coherence
dimensions.definition: Whether internal structural, linguistic, media, temporal, and format-based signals appear coherent or contain unresolved inconsistencies.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Questioned coherence does not imply synthetic generation, falsity, or fraud.

dimensions.name: Evidence Chain Continuity
dimensions.definition: Whether the artifact can be connected to a stable chain of supporting records with examinable custody and linkage.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Broken chain continuity does not prove subject involvement or institutional misconduct.

dimensions.name: Corroboration Posture
dimensions.definition: Whether supporting evidence exists, is absent, partial, or conflicting within the available examination scope.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Absent or conflicting corroboration does not issue a verdict on the underlying claim or subject.

dimensions.name: Subject Boundary Clarity
dimensions.definition: Whether classification language confines posture to artifacts and evidence chains without transferring risk to connected subjects.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Artifact risk must not be read as subject accusation, guilt, or involvement.

dimensions.name: Output Boundary
dimensions.definition: Whether the resulting statement remains within evidence posture framing and avoids verdict, score, or accusation language.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Output boundary violation converts evidence posture into truth verdict or subject judgment.

states.label: documented_posture
states.definition: The artifact or evidence chain has visible support, bounded source context, and no major unresolved posture gaps within the available scope.
required_conditions: provenance or source context visible within scope
no major unresolved posture dimension gaps
states.boundary_statement: Does not mean verified as fact, authentic, complete, or legally verified.
allowed_output_language: The artifact has a documented posture within the available scope.
The evidence chain is documented within available source and provenance context.

states.label: partially_supported_posture
states.definition: The artifact has some supporting signals, but one or more posture dimensions remain incomplete, weak, or unresolved.
required_conditions: at least one supporting posture signal present
one or more dimensions incomplete or unresolved
states.boundary_statement: Does not imply falsity or deception.
allowed_output_language: The evidence chain is partially supported within the available context.
The artifact has a partially supported posture with unresolved dimensions.

states.label: provenance_limited_posture
states.definition: The artifact lacks sufficient origin, custody, publication path, or source-chain visibility.
required_conditions: provenance visibility dimension is limited or absent
origin, custody, or publication path insufficient for stronger posture
states.boundary_statement: Does not establish manipulation or bad faith.
allowed_output_language: The artifact has a provenance-limited posture.
Provenance visibility is insufficient for stronger posture language.

states.label: contextually_unstable_posture
states.definition: The artifact may be difficult to interpret because surrounding context is missing, ambiguous, disputed, or unstable.
required_conditions: contextual stability dimension is missing, disputed, or unstable
states.boundary_statement: Does not determine whether the depicted or referenced event occurred.
allowed_output_language: The artifact has a contextually unstable posture.
Surrounding context is missing, disputed, or unstable for this artifact.

states.label: coherence_questioned_posture
states.definition: The artifact contains internal or relational signals that require further examination before stronger posture language is used.
required_conditions: forensic coherence dimension contains unresolved inconsistencies
states.boundary_statement: Does not imply synthetic generation, falsity, or fraud.
allowed_output_language: The artifact has a coherence-questioned posture.
Internal signals require further examination before stronger posture language.

states.label: high_risk_evidence_posture
states.definition: Multiple posture dimensions contain unresolved risk signals, making the artifact unsuitable for strong reliance without further review.
required_conditions: multiple dimensions contain unresolved risk signals
artifact unsuitable for strong reliance without further review
states.boundary_statement: Does not accuse any connected subject and does not prove deception, guilt, fraud, or subject involvement.
allowed_output_language: The artifact has a high-risk evidence posture requiring further review.
Multiple posture dimensions contain unresolved risk signals on this artifact.

states.label: not_assessable_posture
states.definition: Available information is insufficient to classify the evidence posture responsibly.
required_conditions: available information insufficient for responsible posture classification
states.boundary_statement: Not assessable is not suspicious by itself.
allowed_output_language: This record is not assessable from the available information.
The artifact has a not-assessable posture within the current scope.

states.label: planned_not_claimed_posture
states.definition: A capability, output, route, protocol, or tool layer is described as planned but not currently active.
required_conditions: referenced capability is planned or under development
states.boundary_statement: Must never be presented as an existing capability.
allowed_output_language: This capability is planned and not currently active.
The referenced layer has a planned-not-claimed posture.

prohibited_output_patterns: This confirms the event did not happen.
allowed_output_patterns: The artifact has a provenance-limited posture.
The evidence chain is partially supported within the available context.
This record is not assessable from the available information.
The posture applies to the artifact, not the connected subject.
